semantics: Building record with name, visibility, active storey, and extended property reference fields.
Project environment record with orientation, weather source, city/station metadata, location, pressure, and drawing-position fields.
City and weather-station library table with country, province, city, coordinates, climate, ground-temperature, and note fields.
notes: Likely bridge from site metadata to CLIMATE_DATA and GROUND_DATA.

semantics: Storey record with building ownership, storey number, representative multiplier, height, visibility, and extended property fields.
Room record with group, storey, room type, area, volume, outdoor-air, terminal, fan-coil, radiator, pressure, drawing-position, and extended property fields.
Room-group record with building, air-conditioning system, schedule, setpoint, stiffness, result-view, and HVAC heat-gain fields.
notes: Converted for room temperature setpoint controls and ideal-loads zone equipment. AC_SCHEDULE_ID is used as IdealLoads availability; humidity setpoints, AC_T_* tolerance schedules, and real HVAC grouping remain deferred.

semantics: Room-type template record with occupant, lighting, equipment, HVAC schedule, setpoint, humidity, tolerance, illuminance, remark, and extended property fields.
notes: Current models may also materialize per-room OCCUPANT_GAINS/LIGHT_GAINS/EQUIPMENT_GAINS rows; use this table as fallback/template only until precedence is confirmed.

semantics: Room ventilation relation record whose field comments link a room to an adjacent room or outside boundary with schedule, capacity, type, point, and extended property fields.
notes: Converted only when RELA_ROOM_ID references OUTSIDE; inter-zone mixing remains deferred until adjacent-room semantics are verified. Access field comments define VENT_SCHEDULE_ID as the air-change schedule. VENT_SET_MAX is retained for diagnostics because its unit still needs confirmation.

semantics: Outside boundary marker with name, drawing-position, and extended property fields.
Ground boundary marker with name, drawing-position, and extended property fields.
Surface record with area, azimuth, tilt, owning room, surface type and state, geometry, coefficients, matrix indices, shading, and extended property fields.
Main enclosure relation record with paired side surfaces, middle plane, construction kind, construction reference, calculation subdivision, storey, and extended property fields.
Plane record linking a geometry to baseline start and end points.
Geometry record linking a geometry identifier to its boundary loop.
Loop point membership record with loop ID, point order, point reference, and owning geometry fields.
Point record with point ID, name, and X/Y/Z coordinate fields.
Default-setting record with table and field names, typed default values, type code, kind, and comment fields.
notes: Currently used by window conversion to resolve WINDOW_CONSTRUCTION = 0.

semantics: Annual schedule record with schedule type, name, and 8760-hour data fields.
Opaque material library record with color, group, English and Chinese names, thermal properties, vapor permeability, pattern, deletion, flag, and annotation fields.
Exterior wall construction library record with group, English and Chinese names, resistance, inertia, special flag, flag, deletion, and annotation fields.
Exterior wall construction layer record with construction ID, layer number, material ID, layer thickness or length, and annotation fields.
Interior wall construction library record with group, English and Chinese names, resistance, inertia, special flag, flag, deletion, and annotation fields.
Interior wall construction layer record with construction ID, layer number, material ID, layer thickness or length, and annotation fields.
Roof construction library record with group, English and Chinese names, resistance, inertia, special flag, flag, deletion, and annotation fields.
Roof construction layer record with construction ID, layer number, material ID, layer thickness or length, and annotation fields.
Ground floor construction library record with group, English and Chinese names, resistance, inertia, special flag, flag, deletion, and annotation fields.
Ground floor construction layer record with construction ID, layer number, material ID, layer thickness or length, and annotation fields.
Intermediate floor construction library record with group, English and Chinese names, resistance, inertia, special flag, flag, deletion, and annotation fields.
Intermediate floor construction layer record with construction ID, layer number, material ID, layer thickness or length, and annotation fields.
Air floor construction library record with group, English and Chinese names, resistance, inertia, special flag, flag, deletion, and annotation fields.
Air floor construction layer record with construction ID, layer number, material ID, layer thickness or length, and annotation fields.
Window construction library record with group, English and Chinese names, heat resistance, glass net ratio, reflectance coefficient, flags, deletion, and annotation fields.
notes: Used as a detailed glazing fallback when aggregate WINDOW_TYPE_DATA performance is unavailable or invalid.

semantics: Window construction layer record with window ID, layer number, material ID, layer thickness or length, and annotation fields.
Transparent/application material library record with color, group, names, thermal properties, optical coefficients, emissivity, thickness, pattern, deletion, flag, and annotation fields.
Door construction library record with conductance, material, gap length, glass ratio, transparent material reference, flags, deletion, and annotation fields.
Window instance record with side surfaces, middle plane, enclosure, construction, shading, curtain, schedule, solar heat-gain distribution, storey, type, K, SC, and extended property fields.
notes: TYPE selects the aggregate WINDOW_TYPE_DATA construction; shading and curtain handling remain unconverted.

semantics: Window-type data record with name, layer count, K, SC, energy and light optical ratios, remark, and extended property fields.
notes: K maps to U-Factor, SC maps to SHGC using SHGC = 0.87 * SC, and valid LIGHT_TRANS_RATIO maps to visible transmittance.

semantics: Door instance record with side surfaces, middle plane, enclosure, construction, schedule, user-defined DLL, and extended property fields.
Shading instance record with type, optical properties, library shading reference, material, building ownership, and extended property fields.
notes: The current fixture has no shading instances; postpone until a model with shading is available.

semantics: System shading library record with shield ID, group, English and Chinese names, geometric parameters, and annotation fields.
User/library shading parameter record with type geometry, panel spacing, projection, side panel, price, image, group, note, and extended property fields.
Heat-gain distribution mode record with air, roof, floor, surrounding-surface fractions, and name fields.

Occupant gain record with room, schedule, user-defined flag, maximum/minimum people, heat and moisture per person, outdoor-air requirement, calculation basis, distribution mode, storey, and drawing-position fields.
notes: MIN_REQUIRE_FRESH_AIR is converted as a per-person outdoor-air requirement for zone equipment that supports DesignSpecification:OutdoorAir.

semantics: Lighting gain record with room, schedule, maximum/minimum nameplate power, heat/electric ratio, calculation basis, distribution mode, storey, and drawing-position fields.
Equipment gain record with room, schedule, maximum/minimum heat-gain power, maximum/minimum moisture generation, calculation basis, distribution mode, storey, and drawing-position fields.
Hourly climate data record with hour, dry-bulb temperature, humidity ratio, horizontal radiation, ground temperature, sky temperature, wind speed, wind direction, and coefficient fields.
notes: Likely future source for EPW generation or weather validation.

semantics: Hourly ground-temperature data record with hour and temperature fields.
notes: Selected through SYS_CITY.GROUND_ID when available, with a unique GROUND_DATA.ID fallback; T is aggregated to monthly BuildingSurface ground temperatures.

semantics: Air-conditioning system record with building and storey ownership, supply-temperature schedules, water and system type codes, outdoor-air controls, user-defined supply state, result-view, drawing-position, and extended property fields.

Air-handling unit record with owning system, type, coil, sprayer, heater, humidifier, reheat, heat recovery, exchange coefficient, secondary return air, fan, resistance model, and extended property fields.
VRV outdoor/source equipment record with name, library type reference, drawing-position, and extended property fields.
VRV indoor terminal record with name, library type reference, room group, owning system, position, main-pipe connection point, and extended property fields.
